title: Vector Store - Elasticsearch
description: A vector database component for Elasticsearch, enabling efficient storage and
retrieval of vector embeddings. It supports similarity search, filtering,
and management of vector data with high performance. Supports Elastic Cloud
Serverless, Elastic Cloud Hosted, and self-managed Elasticsearch deployments.
Store text into the Elasticsearch index (index mode only).
Stores the documents into the vector database. The documents must be
run through an embedding model prior to this step to compute the vectors.
This node supports both storing documents and searching them - you can use
the same Elasticsearch node for both upload and retrieve operations.
Searches the database for documents most similar to the given questions.
This node supports both storing documents and searching them - you can use
the same Elasticsearch node for both upload and retrieve operations.
Produces text that is most similar to the given question.
Produces documents that are most similar to the given question.
Produces an answer with the documents that are most similar
to the given question.
Updates the question with documents most similar to the
question and sets up a filter so piping this to another store
driver will limit its answers to the given subset of documents.

vector.cloud.host.description: Enter the Elastic Cloud host URL e.g. <your-deployment-id>.es.<region>.cloud.es.io

vector.index.title: Index Name / Collection Name
vector.index.description: Enter the name of the Elasticsearch index (must be lowercase)

elasticsearch.index.title: Index Name / Collection Name
elasticsearch.index.description: Enter the name of the Elasticsearch index

elasticsearch.mode.title: Store Mode
elasticsearch.mode.description: Toggle between index (text search) and vector store (semantic search).

elasticsearch.search.title: Customize Indexing Search Behavior
elasticsearch.search.description: Customize the search behavior of the index. This option does not affect the ingestion and creation of the index. You can switch between behaviors when searching between pipeline runs.

elasticsearch.matchOperator.title: Match Operator
description: Controls how multiple query terms are matched:
'or' (default) matches documents containing ANY of the query terms,
'and' matches documents containing ALL of the query terms,
'exact' requires the exact phrase to appear in order (phrase matching).

elasticsearch.search.exact.slop.title: Slop
elasticsearch.search.exact.slop.description: The number of words to allow between terms when exact phrase search is enabled.

elasticsearch.search.highlight.title: Return contextual snippets
elasticsearch.search.highlight.description: Use the unified highlighter to return snippets around matches.

elasticsearch.search.highlight.fragment_.title: Snippet size (characters)
elasticsearch.search.highlight.fragment_.description: Maximum characters in the returned highlight snippet (context window) per hit.
